'''Grayyshk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] whose mate died after succumbing to the [[Yellow-blood malaise]] after going on a [[Hrrtayyk ceremony/Legends|hrrtayyk ceremony]].
